_source: atomic-copy — the site's user-facing UI chrome as addressable copy atoms (the verbal counterpart to design tokens; see docs/atomic-copy.md). Every static, human-readable string in build.mjs's templates that is NOT sourced from the content contracts (data/profile.json identity/résumé copy, data/presentation.json render-context slugs, data/site.json corpus) lives here, keyed by a stable dotted id and referenced via copy(id) in build.mjs. An unknown id throws and fails the build (like posts.mjs {{token}} transclusion); scripts/copy-gate.mjs scans the rendered homepage + résumé for any visible word not traceable to an atom. Validated against contract/copy.schema.json.
colophon.more: Hermetic Nix build · keyless-signed in-toto/SLSA provenance (Sigstore · Rekor · GHCR) —
